description.initial: The western lands continue here, a buffer zone between the wilderness and the enchanted territories ahead. Scrub brush and weathered rocks dot the landscape. There's a sense of being between places, no longer in the wild west, but not yet in the magical east. You can see the tops of ancient trees rising in the distance.
description.return: The northern edge where western lands meet the approach to the Enchanted Forest.
description.atmospheric: The air feels different here, heavier with magic from the forest nearby.

north.blockedMessage: Your Adventure has it's limits! Continue on a different path.
